result.text: {"data": {"id": "f8f27f95-7ead-4e80-bc13-f701671d5ab7", "task_key": "TASK-55", "epic_id": "2eb6d16d-fffa-4c4e-99ca-bd3fef1a4526", "title": "Executor-Integration dokumentieren", "description": "Nutzung des Memory Ledgers durch Executor, Resume-Flows und die Abgrenzung zu Learning Artifacts in Epos-/Produktdokumentation konsistent verankern.", "state": "in_review", "assigned_to": "34a71989-e59a-4719-b423-2111cbfa6298", "pinned_skills": [], "definition_of_done": null, "guards": [], "version": 6, "qa_failed_count": 0, "result": "Executor-Integration dokumentiert: Memory Ledger, Worker-Resume und Prompt-Pipeline konsistent verankert. docs/features/memory-ledger.md beschreibt jetzt Worker-/Resume-Flow und die explizite Abgrenzung zu Learning Artifacts. docs/agents/worker.md dokumentiert Multi-Session-Resume mit Memory Ledger vs. Execution-Learnings. docs/agents/prompt-pipeline.md beschreibt die Resume-Semantik des Worker-Prompts. docs/glossary.md korrigiert den Memory-Ledger-Begriff und erg\u00e4nzt Learning Artifact als separaten Dom\u00e4nenbegriff.", "artifacts": [{"path": "docs/features/memory-ledger.md", "type": "doc"}, {"path": "docs/agents/worker.md", "type": "doc"}, {"path": "docs/agents/prompt-pipeline.md", "type": "doc"}, {"path": "docs/glossary.md", "type": "doc"}], "created_at": "2026-03-10 08:51:44.545275+00:00", "updated_at": "2026-03-10 13:27:20.067837+00:00"}}
